title: Ensure app prompts for camera access on load

requirements.summary: Auto-trigger camera permission prompt on FaceScanComponent mount without requiring user interaction
acceptanceCriteria: Opening the app and navigating to the face scan section immediately triggers the browser camera permission dialog.
If camera permission is already granted, the live video feed starts automatically without any button press.
If camera permission is denied or unavailable, a visible error message is shown explaining how to enable camera access.
No additional button press or navigation step is required before the camera permission prompt appears.

file_operations.description: Update the component to call the camera component's startCamera method inside a useEffect hook with an empty dependency array immediately on mount. Use the camera component to support automatic camera initialization and permission prompt triggering. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing. Ensure that when permission is granted the live video feed displays automatically, and when permission is denied a clear, user-friendly error message is shown instructing the user to enable camera access in their browser settings. Remove any existing button-based camera start logic that conflicts with the auto-start behavior.
